description:
Create nix/buck2/prelude.nix that:
1. Fetches upstream buck2-prelude from GitHub at pinned commit
2. Applies patches from nix/patches/prelude/ (if any exist)
3. Copies extensions from nix/buck2/prelude-extensions/
4. Exports as turnkey-prelude derivation

Also create the directory structure:
- nix/buck2/prelude-extensions/ (empty initially)
- nix/patches/prelude/ (empty initially)
title: Create prelude.nix derivation
